title: Deus DAO - R3KT
relevance_summary: Misconfigured burnFrom function allowing attackers to drain DEI tokens from holders

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls burnFrom() with amount = 0 and msg.sender as the account parameter

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls burnFrom() with amount = 0 and msg.sender as the account parameter
summary: A simple implementation error in the DEI token contract allowed attackers to manipulate token approvals and drain funds from holders. A guard could have blocked transactions calling burnFrom() with amount = 0 and msg.sender as the account parameter.
